name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation and late payment alerts instead of manual invoice tracking and reminders.
problem_solved: Late payments causing cash flow gaps

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late payments causing cash flow gaps
